name: BOA Unified Aletheia Workspace

modules.name: BOA Core + Dashboard
modules.role: deployable root, daemon gate, dashboard, installers, billing, AWS workflows

modules.name: AeonUnifiedAletheia FullFeatured
modules.role: agentic reverse-solve app, materialization engine, evolution workspace

unificationRules: BOA remains the root deployable service for AWS App Runner and no-code dashboard access.
Aletheia modules are local source modules under integrations/aletheia/modules and are not just remote links.
TypeScript/Vite Aletheia code keeps its own package boundary to avoid breaking BOA's pure Node runtime.
Secrets, generated platform runtime files, and private deployment scripts are not vendored.
The runtime bridge exposes module status and reverse-solve cybersecurity plans through BOA routes.
